paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.18 as of 2026-07-23, with a change of -6.16 percent from the prior close and -28.94 percent over the last 22 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an article from PR Newswire on 2026-07-23, titled "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights", which discusses the company's admission of shares of common stock.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form on 2026-07-21, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on 2026-07-15, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing.
